thinking.text:
I found the relevant information about the Platinum Rewards Card annual fee rebate. Let me summarize what I found:

From the first document (doc_credit_cards_platinum_rewards_card_010):
- The annual fee rebate is earned only if you meet the required monthly spending threshold in every month of your cardmember year
- A single month below the threshold disqualifies you from receiving the rebate for that entire cardmember year
- If your first cardmember year's annual fee is waived under a promotional offer, the rebate does not apply to that year
- The monthly window starts on the account opening date and refreshes each month on the same calendar day
- You must meet the monthly threshold in all 12 windows to earn the rebate

From the second document (doc_credit_cards_platinum_rewards_card_007):
- The annual fee rebate is $150.00
- The monthly spend threshold is $7,500.00

Now I need to check the user's transactions to see if they've been meeting the $7,500 monthly threshold. The user's account was opened on 11/10/2022, so they've had the card for over 2 years now. Let me get their credit card transactions to check their spending.

Actually, I should first explain the rebate requirements to the user and then check their transactions to see if they qualify. Let me get their transactions first.
